items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 13 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「AWS and Bluesight build AI for hospital 340B compliance」、「中科大等团队开源长视频Agent:剪辑翻车,只改出错片段」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: Function-Aware Fill-in-the-Middle as Mid-Training for Coding Agent Foundation Models
items.summary: Coding agents must integrate external tool returns into ongoing reasoning - a capability that standard left-to-right pretraining on code exposes only in its forward direction. We observe that the action-observation-continuation loop of a coding agent is structurally isomorphic t…

items.title: Deepmind CEO Hassabis says "nobody in the world knows what happens next" so "cautious optimism" means building guardrails now
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：Google Deepmind CEO Demis Hassabis has published a sweeping proposal for how to handle advanced AI. He wants a new US standards body modeled after financial regulator FINRA that would develop evaluation protocols for fr…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: 聊聊今年涌进Anthropic的N个巨佬,他们押注的是下一个十年.
items.summary: 他联合创办了Monzo,英国最大的数字银行之一,用户覆盖英国10... 做过NL2SQL和RAG相关的产品,真的就属于学术能力和工程能力...
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。
